title: astragalus cicerellus
intro: Astragalus cicerellus, also known as the cicer astragalus, is a species of legume that belongs to the pea family and is native to China and Mongolia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular natural remedy for colds and flu. Astragalus cicerellus is commonly prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a supplement in various herbal preparations.
